content.title: Workflow Map

approval_references.title: Process Narrative
approval_references.snippet: The process involves identifying unmatched payment records, reviewing source-system information, classifying exceptions, escalating records requiring approval, and updating tracking records after resolution.

approval_references.title: Current Workflow Steps
approval_references.snippet: 6. Items above the approval threshold are routed to a supervisor.

approval_references.title: Policy and Controls
approval_references.snippet: - Payment exceptions above the approval threshold require supervisor approval.

approval_references.title: Policy and Controls
approval_references.snippet: - Write actions require explicit human approval.

approval_references.title: Sample Records
